_doc: Centralized drop-rate tuning. The Drop Tuning portal page edits this file via export/clipboard. Runtime reads it on dungeon start and at quality.gd / dungeon._create_item_instance call sites. Anything not present falls back to the hardcoded default in the consuming module so removing a key doesn't break the game.

meta_rarity._doc: Independent of rarity tier. Stacks with quality + base rarity. Primal = +50% baseline, Ancient = +20% baseline. Affixes unaffected (have their own tier band).

quality._doc: Multiplier applied to the tail weights (Rusted/Worn/Battered + Mastercrafted/Masterwork) so a tuner can make extreme rolls more or less common without rewriting the table. 1.0 = ship default. 2.0 = double tail probability. 0.5 = halve.

enchant._doc: global_chance_mult scales every item's authored enchant_chance — set to 0 to disable enchant rolls globally; set to 2 to double everything. combo_chance is the secondary roll AFTER the first enchant lands; if it fires + the resulting pair has a registered combo, both flavors are replaced by the compound.

tint_recolor._doc: Per-instance hue/sat recolor rolls (drives item_recolor.gdshader). Adjust to make recolored drops more or less common.

tier_drop_band._doc: Reserved for future per-tier loot bias controls. Empty for now.
